There are Hickory nut trees in front of Holbrook Dental and some in the parking area of J&J Industries next door. Access: Private.
115 Mt Fair Ave, Brooksville, FL 34601, USA

Very tall orange tree that has really large oranges, but you would need a ladder to reach them. Look at the trees to the right of the brown dumpster, it’s right up front. 

It’s a good idea to call the church and ask their permission before harvesting the oran
